creator: brd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Kubilay!

I can maintain it, but I thought it would be better to have it be part of the python team so "we" could all update it.

I built it poudriere, yes. New diff to pet portlint -AC.

The updated diff has the test parts added as far as I can see Is there an easy way to have testport run the tests? I don't see an option to do that.

Thanks for your feedback.
